register_episode_arrival.description: register arrival of a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only register arrival of a patient episode A if it is not the case that A is awaiting handoff and it is not the case that handoff is completed for A
effects: Once I register arrival of a patient episode A, it is the case that A is awaiting handoff

assign_episode_to_handoff_bay.description: assign a patient episode A to a handoff bay B
preconditions: I can only assign a patient episode A to a handoff bay B if it is the case that A is awaiting handoff and the handoff bay B is available and the patient episode A is compatible with the handoff bay B
I can only assign a patient episode A to a handoff bay B if it is not the case that handoff is in progress for A
effects: Once I assign a patient episode A to a handoff bay B, it is the case that A is assigned to handoff bay B and handoff is in progress for A
Once I assign a patient episode A to a handoff bay B, it is not the case anymore that the handoff bay B is available

release_bay_assignment.description: release bay assignment for a patient episode A from a handoff bay B
preconditions: I can only release bay assignment for a patient episode A from a handoff bay B if it is the case that A is assigned to handoff bay B
I can only release bay assignment for a patient episode A from a handoff bay B if it is not the case that care is initiated for A and it is not the case that team assignment is confirmed for A
effects: Once I release bay assignment for a patient episode A from a handoff bay B, it is the case that the handoff bay B is available

Once I release bay assignment for a patient episode A from a handoff bay B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to handoff bay B and it is not the case anymore that handoff is in progress for A and it is not the case anymore that physical handoff is confirmed for A and it is not the case anymore that initial assessment is completed for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires follow up actions and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for transition and it is not the case anymore that a bed assignment is pending for A

assign_stretcher_to_episode.description: assign a stretcher gurney B to a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only assign a stretcher gurney B to a patient episode A if it is the case that A is awaiting handoff and the stretcher B is available
effects: Once I assign a stretcher gurney B to a patient episode A, it is the case that B is assigned to A
Once I assign a stretcher gurney B to a patient episode A, it is not the case anymore that the stretcher B is available

release_stretcher_from_episode.description: release a stretcher gurney B from a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only release a stretcher gurney B from a patient episode A if it is the case that B is assigned to A
effects: Once I release a stretcher gurney B from a patient episode A, it is the case that the stretcher B is available
Once I release a stretcher gurney B from a patient episode A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to A

confirm_physical_handoff.description: confirm physical handoff for a patient episode A using a stretcher gurney B
preconditions: I can only confirm physical handoff for a patient episode A using a stretcher gurney B if it is the case that A is awaiting handoff and handoff is in progress for A and B is assigned to A
I can only confirm physical handoff for a patient episode A using a stretcher gurney B if it is not the case that physical handoff is confirmed for A
effects: Once I confirm physical handoff for a patient episode A using a stretcher gurney B, it is the case that physical handoff is confirmed for A

confirm_physical_handoff_with_paramedic.description: confirm physical handoff for a patient episode A with a paramedic partner B
preconditions: I can only confirm physical handoff for a patient episode A with a paramedic partner B if it is the case that A is awaiting handoff and handoff is in progress for A and the paramedic B is available
I can only confirm physical handoff for a patient episode A with a paramedic partner B if it is not the case that physical handoff is confirmed for A
effects: Once I confirm physical handoff for a patient episode A with a paramedic partner B, it is the case that physical handoff is confirmed for A and A requires follow up actions
Once I confirm physical handoff for a patient episode A with a paramedic partner B, it is not the case anymore that the paramedic B is available

complete_triage_in_room.description: complete triage for a patient episode A in a triage room C using a stretcher gurney B
preconditions: I can only complete triage for a patient episode A in a triage room C using a stretcher gurney B if it is the case that physical handoff is confirmed for A and handoff is in progress for A and B is assigned to A and the triage room C is available
I can only complete triage for a patient episode A in a triage room C using a stretcher gurney B if it is not the case that initial assessment is completed for A
effects: Once I complete triage for a patient episode A in a triage room C using a stretcher gurney B, it is the case that initial assessment is completed for A
Once I complete triage for a patient episode A in a triage room C using a stretcher gurney B, it is not the case anymore that A requires follow up actions

complete_triage_with_consultation_slot.description: complete triage for a patient episode A using a consultation slot B
preconditions: I can only complete triage for a patient episode A using a consultation slot B if it is the case that handoff is in progress for A and B is allocated to the pediatric episode A
I can only complete triage for a patient episode A using a consultation slot B if it is not the case that initial assessment is completed for A
effects: Once I complete triage for a patient episode A using a consultation slot B, it is the case that initial assessment is completed for A
Once I complete triage for a patient episode A using a consultation slot B, it is not the case anymore that A requires follow up actions

reserve_physician_for_episode.description: reserve a physician resource B for a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only reserve a physician resource B for a patient episode A if it is the case that A is awaiting handoff and the physician B is available and the physician resource B is compatible with the patient episode A
effects: Once I reserve a physician resource B for a patient episode A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a physician resource B for a patient episode A, it is not the case anymore that the physician B is available

release_physician_from_episode.description: release a physician resource B from a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only release a physician resource B from a patient episode A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a physician resource B from a patient episode A, it is the case that the physician B is available
Once I release a physician resource B from a patient episode A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_nurse_for_episode.description: reserve a nurse resource B for a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only reserve a nurse resource B for a patient episode A if it is the case that A is awaiting handoff and the nurse B is available and the nurse resource B is compatible with the patient episode A
effects: Once I reserve a nurse resource B for a patient episode A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a nurse resource B for a patient episode A, it is not the case anymore that the nurse B is available

release_nurse_from_episode.description: release a nurse resource B from a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only release a nurse resource B from a patient episode A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a nurse resource B from a patient episode A, it is the case that the nurse B is available
Once I release a nurse resource B from a patient episode A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_equipment_for_episode.description: reserve a special equipment B for a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only reserve a special equipment B for a patient episode A if it is the case that A is awaiting handoff and the equipment B is available and the special equipment B is compatible with the patient episode A
effects: Once I reserve a special equipment B for a patient episode A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a special equipment B for a patient episode A, it is not the case anymore that the equipment B is available

release_equipment_from_episode.description: release a special equipment B from a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only release a special equipment B from a patient episode A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a special equipment B from a patient episode A, it is the case that the equipment B is available
Once I release a special equipment B from a patient episode A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_bed_type_for_episode.description: reserve a bed type B for a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only reserve a bed type B for a patient episode A if it is the case that A is awaiting handoff and the bed type B is available and the bed type B is compatible with the patient episode A
effects: Once I reserve a bed type B for a patient episode A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a bed type B for a patient episode A, it is not the case anymore that the bed type B is available

release_bed_type_from_episode.description: release a bed type B from a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only release a bed type B from a patient episode A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a bed type B from a patient episode A, it is the case that the bed type B is available
Once I release a bed type B from a patient episode A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

initiate_care_in_treatment_area.description: initiate care for a patient episode A in a treatment area B with a physician resource C and a nurse resource D
preconditions: I can only initiate care for a patient episode A in a treatment area B with a physician resource C and a nurse resource D if it is the case that handoff is in progress for A and C is reserved for A and D is reserved for A and the treatment area B is available and the treatment area B is compatible with the patient episode A
I can only initiate care for a patient episode A in a treatment area B with a physician resource C and a nurse resource D if it is not the case that care is initiated for A
effects: Once I initiate care for a patient episode A in a treatment area B with a physician resource C and a nurse resource D, it is the case that A is assigned to the treatment area B and care is initiated for A
Once I initiate care for a patient episode A in a treatment area B with a physician resource C and a nurse resource D, it is not the case anymore that the treatment area B is available

initiate_care_with_diagnostics.description: initiate care with diagnostics for a patient episode A in a treatment area B using a special equipment C and a diagnostic slot D
preconditions: I can only initiate care with diagnostics for a patient episode A in a treatment area B using a special equipment C and a diagnostic slot D if it is the case that handoff is in progress for A and C is reserved for A and the diagnostic slot D is available and the treatment area B is available and the treatment area B is compatible with the patient episode A and the diagnostic slot D is compatible with the patient episode A
I can only initiate care with diagnostics for a patient episode A in a treatment area B using a special equipment C and a diagnostic slot D if it is not the case that care is initiated for A
effects: Once I initiate care with diagnostics for a patient episode A in a treatment area B using a special equipment C and a diagnostic slot D, it is the case that A is assigned to the treatment area B and care is initiated for A and a bed assignment is pending for A and A requires follow up actions

Once I initiate care with diagnostics for a patient episode A in a treatment area B using a special equipment C and a diagnostic slot D, it is not the case anymore that the treatment area B is available and it is not the case anymore that the diagnostic slot D is available

clear_bed_assignment_pending.description: clear bed assignment pending for a patient episode A with a physician resource B and a nurse resource C
preconditions: I can only clear bed assignment pending for a patient episode A with a physician resource B and a nurse resource C if it is the case that care is initiated for A and a bed assignment is pending for A and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A
effects: Once I clear bed assignment pending for a patient episode A with a physician resource B and a nurse resource C, it is not the case anymore that a bed assignment is pending for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires follow up actions

assign_clinical_team.description: assign clinical team to a patient episode A with a physician resource B, a nurse resource C, and a nursing subteam D
preconditions: I can only assign clinical team to a patient episode A with a physician resource B, a nurse resource C, and a nursing subteam D if it is the case that initial assessment is completed for A and care is initiated for A and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A and the clinical team D is eligible for the patient episode A

I can only assign clinical team to a patient episode A with a physician resource B, a nurse resource C, and a nursing subteam D if it is not the case that A requires follow up actions and it is not the case that team assignment is confirmed for A
effects: Once I assign clinical team to a patient episode A with a physician resource B, a nurse resource C, and a nursing subteam D, it is the case that team assignment is confirmed for A

assign_secondary_clinical_team.description: assign secondary clinical team to a patient episode A with a special equipment B, a bed type C, and a secondary clinical team D
preconditions: I can only assign secondary clinical team to a patient episode A with a special equipment B, a bed type C, and a secondary clinical team D if it is the case that initial assessment is completed for A and care is initiated for A and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A and the clinical team D is eligible for the patient episode A

I can only assign secondary clinical team to a patient episode A with a special equipment B, a bed type C, and a secondary clinical team D if it is not the case that team assignment is confirmed for A
effects: Once I assign secondary clinical team to a patient episode A with a special equipment B, a bed type C, and a secondary clinical team D, it is the case that team assignment is confirmed for A and A requires follow up actions

mark_ready_for_transition.description: mark a patient episode A ready for transition with a physician resource B and a nurse resource C
preconditions: I can only mark a patient episode A ready for transition with a physician resource B and a nurse resource C if it is the case that team assignment is confirmed for A and A requires follow up actions and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A
effects: Once I mark a patient episode A ready for transition with a physician resource B and a nurse resource C, it is the case that A is ready for transition

Once I mark a patient episode A ready for transition with a physician resource B and a nurse resource C, it is not the case anymore that A requires follow up actions and it is not the case anymore that initial assessment is completed for A and it is not the case anymore that a bed assignment is pending for A

reopen_assessment_with_stretcher.description: reopen assessment for a patient episode A with a stretcher gurney B in a triage room C
preconditions: I can only reopen assessment for a patient episode A with a stretcher gurney B in a triage room C if it is the case that A is ready for transition and team assignment is confirmed for A and handoff is in progress for A and B is assigned to A and the triage room C is available
I can only reopen assessment for a patient episode A with a stretcher gurney B in a triage room C if it is not the case that initial assessment is completed for A
effects: Once I reopen assessment for a patient episode A with a stretcher gurney B in a triage room C, it is the case that initial assessment is completed for A

complete_handoff_checklist.description: complete handoff checklist for a patient episode A with a stretcher gurney B
preconditions: I can only complete handoff checklist for a patient episode A with a stretcher gurney B if it is the case that team assignment is confirmed for A and initial assessment is completed for A and B is assigned to A

I can only complete handoff checklist for a patient episode A with a stretcher gurney B if it is not the case that A requires follow up actions and it is not the case that handoff checklist is completed for A
effects: Once I complete handoff checklist for a patient episode A with a stretcher gurney B, it is the case that handoff checklist is completed for A

complete_handoff_checklist_with_paramedi.description: complete handoff checklist for a patient episode A with a paramedic partner B
preconditions: I can only complete handoff checklist for a patient episode A with a paramedic partner B if it is the case that team assignment is confirmed for A and initial assessment is completed for A and the paramedic B is available

I can only complete handoff checklist for a patient episode A with a paramedic partner B if it is not the case that A requires follow up actions and it is not the case that handoff checklist is completed for A
effects: Once I complete handoff checklist for a patient episode A with a paramedic partner B, it is the case that handoff checklist is completed for A
Once I complete handoff checklist for a patient episode A with a paramedic partner B, it is not the case anymore that the paramedic B is available

assign_consultation_slot_to_episode.description: assign a consultation slot B to a patient episode A
preconditions: I can only assign a consultation slot B to a patient episode A if it is the case that handoff checklist is completed for A and the consultation slot B is available and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I assign a consultation slot B to a patient episode A, it is the case that the consultation slot B is assigned to the patient episode A
Once I assign a consultation slot B to a patient episode A, it is not the case anymore that the consultation slot B is available

allocate_consultation_slot_for_pediatric.description: allocate a consultation slot C for a pediatric patient subtype A with an adult patient subtype B
preconditions: I can only allocate a consultation slot C for a pediatric patient subtype A with an adult patient subtype B if it is the case that A is awaiting handoff and A has a pediatric episode flag and C is an eligible consultation slot for A and the consultation slot C is assigned to the patient episode B
I can only allocate a consultation slot C for a pediatric patient subtype A with an adult patient subtype B if it is not the case that C is allocated to the pediatric episode A
effects: Once I allocate a consultation slot C for a pediatric patient subtype A with an adult patient subtype B, it is the case that C is allocated to the pediatric episode A

complete_handoff_verification.description: complete handoff verification for a patient episode A using a stretcher gurney B in a triage room C
preconditions: I can only complete handoff verification for a patient episode A using a stretcher gurney B in a triage room C if it is the case that A is awaiting handoff and A has a pediatric episode flag and initial assessment is completed for A and handoff checklist is completed for A and B is assigned to A and the triage room C is available
I can only complete handoff verification for a patient episode A using a stretcher gurney B in a triage room C if it is not the case that handoff documentation is completed for A
effects: Once I complete handoff verification for a patient episode A using a stretcher gurney B in a triage room C, it is the case that handoff documentation is completed for A

finalize_handoff_for_time_sensitive_epis.description: finalize handoff for a time sensitive patient episode A
preconditions: I can only finalize handoff for a time sensitive patient episode A if it is the case that A is a time sensitive episode and A is awaiting handoff and handoff is in progress for A and care is initiated for A and team assignment is confirmed for A and handoff checklist is completed for A and initial assessment is completed for A
I can only finalize handoff for a time sensitive patient episode A if it is not the case that handoff is completed for A
effects: Once I finalize handoff for a time sensitive patient episode A, it is the case that handoff is completed for A

finalize_handoff_with_consultation_slot.description: finalize handoff for a pediatric patient episode A with a consultation slot B
preconditions: I can only finalize handoff for a pediatric patient episode A with a consultation slot B if it is the case that A has a pediatric episode flag and A is awaiting handoff and handoff is in progress for A and care is initiated for A and team assignment is confirmed for A and handoff checklist is completed for A and initial assessment is completed for A and B is allocated to the pediatric episode A
I can only finalize handoff for a pediatric patient episode A with a consultation slot B if it is not the case that handoff is completed for A
effects: Once I finalize handoff for a pediatric patient episode A with a consultation slot B, it is the case that handoff is completed for A

finalize_handoff_with_documentation.description: finalize handoff for a pediatric patient episode A with completed documentation
preconditions: I can only finalize handoff for a pediatric patient episode A with completed documentation if it is the case that A has a pediatric episode flag and A is awaiting handoff and handoff is in progress for A and care is initiated for A and team assignment is confirmed for A and handoff checklist is completed for A and initial assessment is completed for A and handoff documentation is completed for A
I can only finalize handoff for a pediatric patient episode A with completed documentation if it is not the case that handoff is completed for A
effects: Once I finalize handoff for a pediatric patient episode A with completed documentation, it is the case that handoff is completed for A

action_nl_templates.assign_episode_to_handoff_bay: assign patient episode {?patient_episode} to handoff bay {?handoff_bay}
action_nl_templates.release_bay_assignment: release bay assignment for patient episode {?patient_episode} from handoff bay {?handoff_bay}
action_nl_templates.assign_stretcher_to_episode: assign stretcher gurney {?stretcher_gurney} to patient episode {?patient_episode}
action_nl_templates.release_stretcher_from_episode: release stretcher gurney {?stretcher_gurney} from patient episode {?patient_episode}
action_nl_templates.confirm_physical_handoff: confirm physical handoff for patient episode {?patient_episode} using stretcher gurney {?stretcher_gurney}
action_nl_templates.confirm_physical_handoff_with_paramedic: confirm physical handoff for patient episode {?patient_episode} with paramedic partner {?paramedic_partner}
action_nl_templates.complete_triage_in_room: complete triage for patient episode {?patient_episode} in triage room {?triage_room} using stretcher gurney {?stretcher_gurney}
action_nl_templates.complete_triage_with_consultation_slot: complete triage for patient episode {?patient_episode} using consultation slot {?consultation_slot}
action_nl_templates.reserve_physician_for_episode: reserve physician resource {?physician_resource} for patient episode {?patient_episode}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a physical object is also a object

Everything that is a patient episode or a handoff bay or a treatment area or a nurse resource or a physician resource or a special equipment or a stretcher gurney or a paramedic partner or a consultation slot or a triage room or a diagnostic slot or a bed type or a clinical team is also a physical object
Everything that is a nursing subteam or a secondary clinical team is also a clinical team
Everything that is a adult patient subtype or a pediatric patient subtype is also a patient episode
